activities.description: Seafood - Great crawfish and super nice people!

activities.name: Mahogany Jazz Hall
activities.description: Amazing Jazz Musicians, incredible ambiance, intimate setting and a must.

input.reasoning:
Selected Flight 2 (American AA 2183) for best value - direct flight at 7:15am arrival 8:49am, giving full day in New Orleans. At $213 it's only $33 more than cheapest option but saves 5+ hours of travel time with no layovers and offers better legroom (30" vs 28"). 

Chose Inn on Ursulines for accommodation - perfect match at 3-star rating as preferred, located in French Quarter as requested, excellent value at $207 for 3 nights (before taxes), and highly rated at 4.1 stars.

Activity selection focused on user's specific interests:
- Preservation Hall (specifically requested) - iconic jazz venue
- St. Louis Cemetery No. 1 Official Tour (cemetery walking tour as requested)
- Multiple jazz venues (Three Maries, Mahogany Jazz Hall, House of Jazz)
- Cajun crawfish experiences (Louisiana Cajun Crawfish Co., NOLA Gumbo Factory)
- Bourbon Street exploration (specifically requested)

Total cost breakdown:
- Flights: $213
- Hotel: $240 (with taxes)
- Activities: $200
- Food included in activities: ~$100
- Buffer for additional meals/incidentals: ~$867 remaining

All activities scheduled with realistic timing, avoiding conflicts, and distributed across the 3-day trip. Arrival day has afternoon/evening activities, departure day kept light for morning flight home.
input.final_message_to_user: Perfect! I've crafted your 3-day New Orleans jazz and culture adventure within your $1,800 budget. You'll fly direct on American Airlines arriving early morning (8:49am) to maximize your first day, stay at the charming 3-star Inn on Ursulines in the heart of the French Quarter, and experience all your must-dos: Preservation Hall for authentic jazz, a cemetery walking tour, Bourbon Street exploration, multiple jazz clubs, and plenty of Cajun crawfish! Total estimated cost is $1,620, leaving you extra spending money for spontaneous beignets and hurricanes. Laissez les bons temps rouler! 🎺🎷
